title: Autumn Leaves
synopsis: A walk through the park becomes a lesson in how beautiful a season can be.
sentences: The park looked different when autumn arrived.
Leaves in red, gold, and brown covered the paths and grass.
Marta walked there with her father after school.
Every step made a soft crunch under their shoes.
Marta picked up a leaf shaped like a star and held it against the light.
Her father said each tree seemed to choose its own colors.
They watched the wind lift a few leaves and carry them in circles.
At one bench, Marta arranged her favorite leaves in a row from smallest to largest.
A dog ran through a pile and sent them flying everywhere.
Marta laughed so hard she almost dropped the leaves still in her hands.
On the way home, she placed the best ones inside a notebook.
She wanted to keep a little of autumn after the season was gone.
